content.json:
# OSS Vulnerability Remediation — AI Usage & Fix History

Run history, retry lineage, and Claude token spend for the Fixer/Watcher pipeline. Data source: the `traces` table (Application Insights), populated by `agents/common/telemetry.py`. Deployed (`DEPLOYMENT_MODE=azure`) only — see PLAN.md section 4.9 and DEPLOYMENT_AAF.md section 3.6. If a panel below renders empty, widen the time range control (top right) — it defaults to the last 30 days.

content.query:
traces
| where message == "FixAttemptCompleted"
| extend repo = tostring(customDimensions.repo),
         component = tostring(customDimensions.component_name),
         old_version = tostring(customDimensions.old_version),
         new_version = tostring(customDimensions.new_version),
         mode = tostring(customDimensions.mode),
         cve_ids = tostring(customDimensions.cve_ids),
         framework = tostring(customDimensions.framework_detected),
         unit_test_status = tostring(customDimensions.unit_test_status),
         prompt_tokens = toint(customDimensions.prompt_tokens),
         completion_tokens = toint(customDimensions.completion_tokens),
         total_tokens = toint(customDimensions.total_tokens),
         attempt_number = toint(customDimensions.attempt_number)
| project timestamp, repo, component, old_version, new_version, mode, attempt_number, cve_ids, framework, unit_test_status, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens
| order by timestamp desc

traces
| where message in ("FixResolved", "FixEscalated", "FixRetryRequested")
| extend repo = tostring(customDimensions.repo),
         component = tostring(customDimensions.component_name),
         pr_number = tostring(customDimensions.pr_number),
         attempt_number = toint(customDimensions.attempt_number),
         reason = tostring(customDimensions.reason),
         resolution_hours = round(todouble(customDimensions.time_to_resolution_seconds) / 3600, 2),
         outcome = message
| project timestamp, outcome, repo, component, pr_number, attempt_number, reason, resolution_hours
| order by timestamp desc

content.json:
## Token Usage & Spend

Token usage per CVE/component fix, and aggregated over time — this is what the model calls actually cost, independent of Azure AI Foundry's own platform-level token metrics (Section 3.6 of DEPLOYMENT_AAF.md covers enabling those too, for a second, code-free cross-check).

content.query:
traces
| where message == "FixAttemptCompleted"
| extend component = tostring(customDimensions.component_name), total_tokens = toint(customDimensions.total_tokens)
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens), FixAttempts = count() by component
| order by TotalTokens desc
| take 20

traces
| where message == "FixAttemptCompleted"
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions.total_tokens)
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens), FixAttempts = count() by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc

traces
| where message == "FixAttemptCompleted"
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions.total_tokens), mode = tostring(customDimensions.mode)
| summarize FixAttempts = count(), TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens), AvgTokensPerAttempt = round(avg(total_tokens), 0) by mode
| order by mode asc

items.name: query - fresh vs retry token cost

content.json:
## Resolution Rate

Counts of confirmed-fixed vs. escalated-to-human outcomes over time — the 'gains' side of the ROI picture (PLAN.md's Complex Upgrades vs. ROI section).

content.query:
traces
| where message in ("FixResolved", "FixEscalated")
| summarize Count = count() by bin(timestamp, 1d), Outcome = message
| order by timestamp asc

items.name: query - resolved vs escalated over time
